definition:
1. to drive through  or across , with genitive, τάφροιο διήλασεν ἵππους (Iliad by Homer) 
2. to thrust through , λαπάρης διήλασεν ἔγχος (Iliad by Homer) 
3. δ. τινὰ λόγχῃ to thrust  one through  with a lance, (Plutarch) 
4. intransitive (entry ἵππον); to ride through, charge through , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
